creator: conrads@cox.net
text:
On Wed, 21 Mar 2012 10:05:51 -0700
Jason Helfman <jgh@freebsd.org> wrote:

> It seems to me that this diff is out-of-date. Comments?
> 
> Have a look at this pr:
> http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=166061&cat=

Yes, that was the one Muhammad submitted last Sunday for the older
version of the ch package (for FreeBSD 5.1), in which he also asked to
assume maintainership.

I hadn't yet picked up the commit of his patch in my local CVS when I
submitted mine later that same day, for the new version of ch for
FreeBSD 9.0.

This has gotten a bit confusing, I know.  The last patch Muhammad
submitted (for the FreeBSD 9.0 version of ch) is the one that should be
committed.

-- 
Conrad J. Sabatier
conrads@cox.net
